title: MacOS Optimized
description: A Modpack for those that play Minecraft on macOS with Apple Silicon [M Series] or Intel systems
body:
# ✨ ⛏️ **Version 26.1.2 Official Available** ⛏️ ✨


#  MacOS Optimized

This Fabric based Modpack is for those that play Minecraft on macOS with Apple Silicon [M Series] or Intel systems. The modpack includes the necessary Fabric mods and supporting libraries to enable a better game play experience. Plus we've added a few extra quality of life (QOL) mods to enhance the vanilla game play.

![Sample Image - Pale Garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Gr4XOtew/images/105b39413ba558b0c30cda4af36e79233dec4db8.png)

## Features

- Massively improved FPS (100+ on M Serices)
- Ability to run popular sharders (Complementary, BSL, etc.)
- Keyboard & mouse combo fixes for combat & PvP
- _Not overloaded_ with unnecessary mods
- Updated available as soon as possible

### How to Support
1. Give this project a heart ❤️
2. If any other versions of Minecraft support is wanted, please add your request via the Issue link.
3. If additional mods, shader packs, resource packes or tweaks are wanted, please add your request via the Issue link.

## What to Know
### Versions Available

- Minecarft 26.1.x Tiny Takeover
- Minecraft 1.21.11 Mounts of Mayhem
- Minecraft 1.21.10 The Copper Age
- Minecraft 1.21.8 Chase the Skies
- Minecraft 1.21.6 Chase the Skies
- Minecraft 1.21.5 Spring to Life
- Minecraft 1.21.4 The Garden Awakens
- Minecarft 1.21.1 Tricky Trials
- Minecraft 1.20.4 Trails & Tales

### Supported Launchers
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app)
- [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/)
- [MultiMC](https://multimc.org/)

### Tweaking Your Experience
- **Maximize FPS:** 
  1. Disable VSync & set Max Framerate to Unlimited in `Options->Video Settings`
  2. Reduce Display resoltion `System Settings->Displays`
- **Shaders:** Be sure to adjust shader pack quality for better game play on your system
- **Zoomify:** Check keybindings to make sure their isn't a conflicts in `Options->Controls->Key Binds`

## Modpack Details

<summary>Mod List</summary>

  - Better Block Entities
  - Cloth config
  - Clumps
  - Entity Culling
  - Entity Texture Features

  - Ferrite Core
  - Immediately Fast
  - Iris
  - LambDynamicLights
  - Lithium
  - MacOS Input Fixes
  - Modmenu
  - More Culling
  - Reeses Sodium Options
  - Retino
  - Sodium
  - Sodium Extra
  - Yet Another Config Lib

__1.21.4 & lower__

  - Dynamic FPS
  - Indium
  - Memoryleak Fix

</details>

<details>

  - Capes

<details>
